_comment: Default configuration for copilot-qa-suite. Override via ~/.config/copilot-qa-suite/config.json or per-project $CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/.claude/copilot-qa-suite.json or environment variables (see README).

copilot._comment: model is the global fallback. Per-hook overrides live under <hook>.model. config_dir isolates Copilot CLI state (trusted_folders, model overrides, logs) from the user's interactive Copilot. Default ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_DATA}/copilot — neutralizes contention with ~/.copilot/{settings,config}.json. github_token: GitHub PAT with the Copilot Requests scope. NEVER store this in a project-level config that gets committed; keep it in ~/.config/copilot-qa-suite/config.json (chmod 600) or in the COPILOT_QA_COPILOT_TOKEN env var. An existing COPILOT_GITHUB_TOKEN env var always wins — the wrapper only exports the config-resolved token when none is in scope already.

fallback._comment: Context-instruction fallback. When Copilot CLI signals a token / quota / rate / usage limit, the wrapper emits the per-hook fallback-prompt.txt + CONTEXT block as additionalContext for the parent Claude session, which performs the read-only analysis itself. No second model is invoked — no model/timeout/extra_args needed. enabled: master switch (per-hook override <hook>.fallback.enabled). detection_patterns: ERE regex (case-insensitive) matched against Copilot stdout+stderr; on hit the wrapper emits the instruction.

limits._comment: Claude Code caps each hook injection (additionalContext/systemMessage/stdout) at 10000 characters; overflow is spilled to disk by the harness with an undocumented preview format. We budget 8000 per hook (2K headroom for header + engine label + behavioural notes) and 24000 across all sub-hook outputs concatenated in dispatcher. spill_threshold_chars: above this size the hook writes the full body to a cache file and references it from additionalContext (controlled spill, sidesteps the harness preview). spill_to_file=false reverts to plain truncation at max_context_chars.

doc._comment: comment_language is the natural language used in the generated doc comments. Use a name Copilot will recognize: 'English', 'German' (or 'Deutsch'), 'French', 'Spanish', 'Japanese', etc. Identifiers, types, and code snippets always stay in the source language. model overrides copilot.model for this hook only. fallback.enabled overrides the global fallback section (null = inherit).

code_review._comment: max_findings caps how many findings Copilot may emit per file. Helps keep additionalContext within max_context_chars and reduces fix-fatigue. model overrides copilot.model for this hook only. fallback.enabled overrides the global fallback section (null = inherit).

unittest._comment: Unit tests are emitted WITHOUT comments — documentation is added afterwards by the doc hook when it fires on the new test file. model overrides copilot.model for this hook only. fallback.enabled overrides the global fallback section (null = inherit).

proguard._comment: model overrides copilot.model for this hook only. fallback.enabled overrides the global fallback section (null = inherit).

check_copilot._comment: auto_trust_folder=true: SessionStart hook adds CWD to plugin-private trusted_folders automatically (security decision — default false). inherit_user_trust=true: on first run per project, copy matching trusted_folders from ~/.copilot/{settings,config}.json into the plugin's private config dir (default false; one-time consent recorded in inherit_consent.marker).

cleanup._comment: SessionEnd cleanup. cache_max_age_days prunes file-content cache shards older than N days; copilot_logs_max_age_days prunes Copilot CLI's own session logs in the plugin-private config dir. Set either to 0 to disable that pruning step.
